name: 正式演讲
subject: english
domain_name: 语言与口语 / Language & Speaking / Language & Speaking
curriculum_points: SL.11-12.4: Present information, findings, and supporting evidence, conveying a clear and distinct perspective, such that listeners can follow the line of reasoning, alternative or opposing perspectives are addressed, and the organization, development, substance, and style are appropriate to purpose, audience, and a range of formal and informal tasks.
